   +------+
   |  In  |
   +---+--+
       |
       |
       |
       |
       |
       |
       +----+--
+-----------o------------------+
|  Outer      |                |
|             |                |
|             |                |
|             |                |
+-------------o--------+       |
|  Inner      |        |       |
|   +---------o----+   |       |
|   |  Deep | |    |   |       |
|   |       v-+    |   |       |
|   |  +--------+  |   |       |
|   |  |  Node  |  |   |       |
|   |  +----+---+  |   |       |
|   |       |      |   |       |
|   +--o----o------+   |       |
+------v----o----------+       |
|  +-------+                   |
|  |  Out  |                   |
|  +-------+                   |
+------------------------------+
